name: task-md-workflow
description: Create and execute resumable Markdown task plans with unique task IDs and per-subtask commits.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and execute resumable Markdown tasks
interface.longDescription: Project-local Codex plugin that provides skills for turning goals into resumable Markdown task files and executing those tasks by ID with a git commit after each completed subtask.
defaultPrompt: Create a task md for this goal
